text: Any person who signs a notice to correct or a certificate of correction with a false or fictitious name is guilty of a misdemeanor.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 17. OFFENSES AND PROSECUTION [40000.1 - 41610]
### Chapter 2. Procedure on Arrests [40300 - 40618]
#### Article 4. Notice to Correct Violation [40610 - 40618]
##### § 40614

Any person who signs a notice to correct or a certificate of correction with a false or fictitious name is guilty of a misdemeanor.

*(Added by Stats. 1978, Ch. 1350.)*

subsections.text: Any person who signs a notice to correct or a certificate of correction with a false or fictitious name is guilty of a misdemeanor.
